### 🗒️ Changelog Entry

**Target Version:**  
v5.3.1

**Changes Documented:**
- [x] Added
- [x] Fixed
- [ ] Removed

**Added:**
- Stripe integration for automated billing and resilient webhook handling
- Real-time analytics dashboard powered by Umami and Svelte
- Enhanced observability via Sentry, GCP Logging, and custom dashboards
- Progressive delivery support using Argo for Kubernetes deployments
- Biome-driven code formatting and linting integrated into CI via Bun

**Fixed:**
- Validation inconsistencies across platforms resolved with Valibot
- Token refresh failures addressed on iOS and Android
- Docker image layering optimized to reduce cold starts on GCP Cloud Run
- Improved reliability of Cloudflare cache invalidation

**Checklist:**
- [x] Linked to actual release PR
- [x] Format validated
